parsed.name: cubrid-mysql-select-full-scan
parsed.description: Full table scan on a 1K-row table. Measures sequential read throughput for CUBRID (pycubrid) vs MySQL (PyMySQL). Replicates cubrid-benchmark Tier 1: bench_select_10k_full_scan.

queries: CREATE TABLE bench_select_full (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, amount INT NOT NULL)

steps.name: select-full-scan
steps.query: SELECT id, name, amount FROM bench_select_full
